headline: Bolivia Eyes USDT Amid 30% Dollar Shortfall Crisis

article.title: Bolivia mulls recognizing USDT as payment currency amid dollar shortage
article.summary: As foreign currency reserves remain under pressure, Bolivia is considering a framework to let the world’s largest stablecoin be used for payments, savings and trade.

article.title: Stock Rally Drives Calpers to 14.8% Return in Fiscal 2026
article.summary: The California Public Employees’ Retirement System reported a 14.8% gain for its latest fiscal year, with results driven by stocks and private equity.

headline: Stocks, Bonds Drop 2% on Oil Surge, Rate Fears

article.title: Stocks, Bonds Fall as Oil Jump Fuels Fed-Hike Bets: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A standoff between the US and Iran lifted oil prices, with stocks joining bonds lower after clashes over the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about a disruption in energy supplies that could fuel inflation.
